signals.trend: Antimony onshoring: stockpile policy becomes revenue
signals.why: First physical deliveries under a $245M DLA antimony contract convert stockpile policy into cash for the only US antimony smelter, with cumulative government orders now $57.3M.
signals.evidence: Delivered ~82,000 lbs of antimony metal ingots in first two Q2 shipments (~$2.6M invoiced to DLA in June); shares up 12.2% week-over-week.

sources.name: The Motley Fool
sources.title: Why Shares of United States Antimony Are Soaring This Week

signals.trend: Greenland rare earths: Tanbreez pure-play sharpens
signals.why: Amended scheme mechanics for the European Lithium roll-up plus a strategic spin-off process sharpen CRML into a pure-play on Tanbreez — one of the largest heavy-REE/gallium deposits outside China.
signals.evidence: Entered an amendment deed to the Scheme Implementation Deed, transaction to be implemented during September 2026; acceleration plan targets a Tanbreez pilot plant by Aug 2026.

sources.name: GlobeNewswire
sources.title: Critical Metals Corp. Update on Proposed Acquisition of European Lithium

sources.name: StockTitan
sources.title: Critical Metals weighs asset sale, spin-off to fund Tanbreez push

signals.trend: First European quantum pure-play lists on Nasdaq
signals.why: IQM's SPAC debut gives US investors the first European superconducting-qubit pure-play, extending the quantum listing wave into small-cap territory.
signals.evidence: ADSs began trading under 'IQMX' on July 2 after completing the Real Asset Acquisition Corp. combination at a ~$1.9B valuation.

sources.name: Business Wire
sources.title: IQM Becomes First European Quantum Company on a Major U.S. Exchange

sources.name: The Quantum Insider
sources.title: IQM Joins Nasdaq as Public Quantum Computing Company

sources.name: TechCrunch
sources.title: IQM admits the future of the tech is uncertain

signals.why: Wedbush's Outperform initiation ($85 PT) reframes Kratos as the sole-source subsystem supplier across hypersonics (MACH TB 2.0 prime, up to ~$1.45B OTA), missile defense, space and microelectronics.
signals.evidence: Wedbush called Kratos 'the merchant arms supplier for the entire U.S. defense complex,' modeling hypersonics revenue rising from ~$200M (2025) to ~$700M (2027).

sources.name: Benzinga
